name: Volvo. AB ser. B KO 1(220)
summary: Volvo. AB ser. B KO 1(220) represents a call option on Volvo AB series B shares with a strike price of 220 SEK. A call option gives the holder the right, but not the obligation, to purchase Volvo AB series B shares at the strike price before the expiration date. Volvo AB is a Swedish manufacturer of trucks, buses, construction equipment, and marine and industrial engines.
